stem: An assembler at a factory builds widgets and gadgets. It takes the assembler 2.3 minutes to build a widget and 4.1 minutes to build a gadget. The assembler spends a total of 71.5 minutes building x widgets and y gadgets. Which equation represents this situation?
rationale:
Choice A is correct. The total time is 2.3 minutes times the number of widgets plus 4.1 minutes times the number of gadgets, equal to 71.5 minutes.

Choice B swaps the per-item times. Choices C and D mishandle the coefficients.
